summary: Comprehensive testing of Payment Tracking System for Pharmaceutical CRM - All core features working correctly

minor.issue: Cannot create doctor with only opening_balance - requires reg_no, email fields
minor.note: Not a bug - validation working as designed

action_items: Customer portal ledger requires customer to be linked to doctor/medical/agency entity - test customer (9999777766) has doctor_id=null
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment tracking system fully tested. Backend APIs (payments CRUD, outstanding dashboard, ledger, PDF export) all working. Frontend Payments page with Outstanding/History tabs, Record Payment form, Ledger dialog, filter by type, all functional. Opening balance fields present in Doctor/Medical/Agency forms. Customer portal ledger endpoint requires proper customer linking (doctor_id/medical_id/agency_id).

features_tested.Admin Payments page loads with Outstandi: PASS - Shows customers with outstanding dues, summary cards by type
features_tested.Record Payment button opens form: PASS - Form has customer search, date, amount, mode selection (Cash/UPI/GPay/Netbanking/Cheque/Credit), notes
features_tested.Payment History tab shows payments with: PASS - Shows date, customer, mode, amount, notes, trash icon for delete
features_tested.Filter by Doctor/Medical/Agency type: PASS - Works on both Outstanding and Payment History tabs
features_tested.Ledger button opens ledger dialog: PASS - Shows opening balance, invoices, payments with running balance, date filters
features_tested.Ledger export as PDF: PASS - PDF button available, API returns valid PDF file
features_tested.Opening Balance in Doctors form: PASS - Field visible in create/edit doctor form
features_tested.Opening Balance in Medicals form: PASS - Field visible in create/edit medical form
features_tested.Opening Balance in Agencies form: PASS - Field visible in create/edit agency form
features_tested.Customer portal Ledger page: PARTIAL - API works but requires customer linked to entity (test data not linked)
